inputs.label: Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Volumetric flow rate of water through the turbine.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volumetric flow rate of water through the turbine.
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumetrischer Durchfluss des Wassers durch die Turbine.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit volumétrique de l'eau à travers la turbine.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caudal volumétrico de agua a través de la turbina.

inputs.label: Head
inputs.businessContext: Net hydraulic head, the effective height water falls.

businessContext_i18n.en: Net hydraulic head, the effective height water falls.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Net hidrolik düşü, suyun düştüğü etkin yükseklik.
businessContext_i18n.de: Netto-Fallhöhe, die effektive Höhe, die das Wasser fällt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur de chute nette, hauteur effective de la chute d'eau.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura hidráulica neta, la altura efectiva que cae el agua.

inputs.label: Turbine Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the turbine in converting hydraulic energy to mechanical energy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the turbine in converting hydraulic energy to mechanical energy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Türbinin hidrolik enerjiyi mekanik enerjiye dönüştürme verimi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirkungsgrad der Turbine bei der Umwandlung von hydraulischer in mechanische Energie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement de la turbine pour convertir l'énergie hydraulique en énergie mécanique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia de la turbina al convertir energía hidráulica en energía mecánica.

inputs.label: Generator Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the electrical generator in converting mechanical energy to electrical energy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the electrical generator in converting mechanical energy to electrical energy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Elektrik jeneratörünün mekanik enerjiyi elektrik enerjisine dönüştürme verimi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirkungsgrad des elektrischen Generators bei der Umwandlung von mechanischer in elektrische Energie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement du générateur électrique pour convertir l'énergie mécanique en énergie électrique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia del generador eléctrico al convertir energía mecánica en energía eléctrica.

inputs.label: Water Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of water, usually 1000 kg/m³ for freshwater.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of water, usually 1000 kg/m³ for freshwater.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Suyun yoğunluğu, genellikle tatlı su için 1000 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Wassers, normalerweise 1000 kg/m³ für Süßwasser.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique de l'eau, généralement 1000 kg/m³ pour l'eau douce.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del agua, normalmente 1000 kg/m³ para agua dulce.

inputs.label: Gravity
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity, standard is 9.81 m/s².

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceleration due to gravity, standard is 9.81 m/s².
businessContext_i18n.fr: Accélération due à la gravité, standard 9,81 m/s².
businessContext_i18n.es: Aceleración debida a la gravedad, estándar es 9.81 m/s².

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
